pi_items.source: Confirmed from task.json description, setup_task.sh paths, export_result.sh verification, and verifier.py logic.
Confirmed by export_result.sh Python snippet and verifier.py ID check logic.
Confirmed from verifier.py which explicitly requires Check 10006, 10007, and 10008 to be defined in the parsed YAML policy.
Confirmed from setup_task.sh which explicitly generates these exact paths and sets their initial modes to simulate a failing application configuration.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) policy inside the Wazuh Manager container. All data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh, simulating a misconfigured payment gateway. The expected policy file is '/var/ossec/etc/sca/payment_gateway_audit.yml' with a policy ID of 10005. It must include three specific check IDs: 10006 (verifying permissions on /opt/payment_gateway/config/keys.pem), 10007 (verifying ownership on /opt/payment_gateway/logs), and 10008 (verifying content inside /opt/payment_gateway/config/app.conf). The exact target paths match the setup scripts and verifier logic perfectly.
